text: Hey, so I was just wondering if there's a way to check the status of my order? Also, I'm kind of confused because last time I checked, it said it was shipped, but like, I haven’t received anything yet. Do they deliver on weekends or something? I feel like I might have missed it or maybe my neighbor took it? Anyway, just wanted to clear that up. Thanks!

I seem to be encountering a rather perplexing issue where the application crashes unexpectedly every time I attempt to initiate a file upload, regardless of the format being used. I have ensured that my operating system is updated to the latest version, and yet this problem persists. Could there possibly be a conflict with other software installed on my device, or is this a known issue with the latest update? Additionally, I would appreciate any suggestions for temporary workarounds until a permanent fix is available, as this is critically impacting my workflow.

I'm really frustrated because I can't seem to access my account anymore. I tried resetting my password like three times, and it just keeps saying the link is expired. Plus, I just got a weird email about my subscription being canceled, which is super confusing since I never even requested that! What's going on?
I want a refund. I didn’t get the item I ordered. But I also think it was delivered. Not sure.
My app keeps crashing. It worked fine yesterday, but now it just won’t open at all.

I recently noticed that my account balance seems lower than what I expected. I remember getting a notification about a fee, but I’m not sure why it was applied. Can you help me understand this better? Also, my friend told me about a 'mystery charge' on their statement too, so I'm just a bit worried. Any insights would be appreciated!
Hey, I can't seem to log in, and it says my account doesn't exist? I swear I had one. Can you check it out?

Hey there! I’ve been wondering, like, can you tell me if I’m able to switch my plan whenever I want, or is it some kind of complicated process? Just trying to figure things out while dealing with work and life, you know?
Hey, I can't seem to log in. The password reset link took forever, and now I can't find the email! Also, isn’t there a way to see my old orders or something?
hi, I really need help with my order. I asked for a refund like weeks ago and nobody got back to me! this is so frustrating. I just want my money back, ugh!
I can’t access my account. Can you help me get back in?
My account got locked for no reason and now I can't get in. Tried the recovery but it’s not working.
hey i tried to log in, but it says my account's not found? like what? i just payed last week??
I just found out that the upgrade I paid for isn't working at all. It's super frustrating because I was really looking forward to those new features. Can someone explain why this is happening?

I am quite displeased with the recent experience I had regarding my order. It seems there is a significant issue that has not been addressed properly, which I find quite troubling. The response time has been lacking, and I must say I expected better. Could you please provide clarity on this matter?
